item.title: They Had No Remorse! - Hayes and Komisarjevsky
item.description: Cheshire home invasion murders which is also known as The Petit family massacre. The perpetrators were Joshua Komisarjevsky and Steven Hayes and the crimes they undertook will make your toes curl with horror and disgust. They showed no remorse, nothing! Have you heard of this case before?

media:content.media:title: They Had No Remorse! - Hayes and Komisarjevsky

The perpetrators were Joshua Komisarjevsky and Steven Hayes and the crimes they undertook will make your toes curl with horror and disgust. They showed no remorse, nothing! Have you heard of this case before?
